name: Desire HERO Geats - Entry Form
desc:
​If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Buckle" Spell from your Deck to your hand, or, if you control "Desire Grand Prix Invitation", you can add 1 "Desire Hero" monster from your Deck to your hand instead.
If this card is equipped with "Boost Buckle": You can send that Equip Card to the GY; add 1 "Desire Grand Prix Invitation" from your Deck to your hand.
If this card is equipped with "Magnum Buckle": You can send that Equip Card to the GY; inflict 200 damage to your opponent.
You can only use each effect of "Desire Hero Geats – Entry Form" once per turn.
